message:
fix: safe integer casts, #[must_use] annotations, and minor clippy fixes

cancel/symbol_cancel.rs:
- Change CleanupHandler::name() return type from &str to &'static str
  for more precise lifetime semantics

distributed/tests.rs:
- Replace unsafe `i as u64` casts with u64::try_from(i).expect(...)
- Change loop variables from 0..8 to 0u32..8 for explicit types

http/h2/connection.rs:
- Replace `payload_len as usize` with usize::try_from(payload_len)
  in test assertions to catch truncation on 16-bit platforms

lab/http/client.rs:
- Add #[must_use] to get(), post_json(), delete(), send() methods
  to prevent silent discard of request builders
- Elide lifetime: impl<'a> RequestBuilder<'a> → impl RequestBuilder<'_>

raptorq/tests.rs:
- Replace `as u64` casts with u64::try_from() / u64::from() for
  safe integer widening

time/sleep.rs, transport/mock.rs, types/id.rs:
- Minor alignment and annotation additions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
